title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXVIII. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Rowley Powley, pudding and pie,
        Kissed the girls and made them cry;
        When the girls begin to cry,
        Rowley Powley runs away.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXVIII. Love And Matrimony." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
